feed.description: Mountain biking talk: trails, technique, gear, and the people who build the ride.

# Singletrack Sessions — Episode
## The Risk You Didn't Name
Host: Maya
Guest: Sophie Laurent
#fixture-v3: voice=en-US host_voice=en-US
Maya: Welcome back to Singletrack Sessions.
I'm with Sophie Laurent, enduro racer and coach.
Today's episode is sponsored by Strava.
